name: Solar Lance
materialDescription: a polished brass needle worth at least 25 gp
description: A lance of condensed sunlight streaks toward a creature you can see within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes radiant damage and sheds dim light until the start of your next turn.
effectOnMiss: The lance misses and leaves a brief flare of harmless light.

spellModifiers.details: Radiant damage dealt by Solar Lance.
The target sheds dim light and is easier to track until the start of your next turn.

spellConditions.details: On a critical hit, the target can be blinded until the end of its next turn, at the DM's discretion.

higherLevels.details: The radiant damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3rd.
